summary: T21: Added 31 isolation-pattern tests (73 assertions) for Phase 1 optimizations — model ID resolution cache (T5, 6 tests), skill-RL memoization (T7, 4 tests), budget-aware scoring penalty (T4, 10 tests), advice cache (T6, 11 tests). Discovered JS falsy-zero quirk: costPenalties[trivial]=0 with || operator applies default 0.05 penalty.
